reviews.review_title: Really good map design but a lot of bugs
reviews.review_description: I love games that have that eerie felling. Like something is always watching you and following you. This game is all of those aspects put into some of the best maps I have seen come out of a gorilla tag fan game. Jumpscares are unnecessarily loud that you have to turn your headset volume all the way down, the ambiance is perfect and in levels like catacombs the sound design really makes you feel like something is with you. The main problem that breaks my time playing the game is bugs. You cant even make it past the third level without having to go back to spawn, and when you do the teleport doesn’t even work unless you are in a private lobby and most times that won’t work either. The only levels you can play 100% of the time is  sewers, container yard, abandoned offices and catacombs. All the others are hit or miss, except for caves which is always a miss. Really good game. A lot of bugs.
The game is awesome! One of the best horror games on meta, but there's a problem. NOBODY PLAYS ANYMORE! PLEASE PEOPLE PLAY AGAIN I HATE BEING ALONE IN THERE!
